author: y4rr
content: Result: Added GPU PTX kernels for LogSoftmax forward (shared-memory row-wise max + sum-exp reduction) and backward (shared-memory sum-grad reduction). Backend trait methods (log_softmax_f32, log_softmax_backward_f32), CudaBackendImpl overrides, and activation.rs GPU dispatch wired up. Forward computes exp(log_softmax) on GPU for backward softmax storage.
